name: chr19_19p12_ZNF_block
description: 19p12 proximal ZNF cluster (small cluster, ~10-15 KRAB-ZNF paralogs) immediately telomeric to the 19 centromere. Includes ZNF676, ZNF66, ZNF492, ZNF676 paralogs and the pericentric SD-rich field that contributes to chr19 pericentric inversion polymorphism.

architecture.internal_structure: Tandem KRAB-ZNF paralog blocks of 10-30 kb at 95-99% identity interspersed with pericentric SDs; abundant intra- and inter-chromosomal SDs in proximal 19p; partially collapsed in GRCh38.
